_comment: Template for nq-serve.service. Each host customizes locally; live configs live outside the repo (gitignored). See README and AGENTS.md.
_notifications_comment: Optional. Channels: discord, slack, file. min_severity: info | warning | critical. Empty channels list disables outbound notifications without removing the block.
_liveness_comment: Optional. Path NQ writes its sentinel-readable liveness artifact to. Consumers (Night Shift, oncall sentinel) tail this file out-of-band.
